title: Undertake operational maintenance of machinery
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Undertake operational maintenance of machinery demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for maintenance

pcs.text: Confirm with supervisor activity to be undertaken, including identifying and reporting potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm with supervisor activity to be undertaken, including identifying and reporting potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm with supervisor activity to be undertaken, including identifying and reporting potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select tools and supplies that conform with job requirements and maintenance plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select tools and supplies that conform with job requirements and maintenance plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select tools and supplies that conform with job requirements and maintenance plan.

pcs.text: Select and check serviceability of tools, equipment and materials according to machinery operation and maintenance manual
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and check serviceability of tools, equipment and materials according to machinery operation and maintenance manual?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and check serviceability of tools, equipment and materials according to machinery operation and maintenance manual.

pcs.text: Select and maintain personal protective equipment according to workplace safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and maintain personal protective equipment according to workplace safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and maintain personal protective equipment according to workplace safety requirements.

pcs.text: Fit and use personal protective equipment applicable to maintenance task to be undertaken
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Fit and use personal protective equipment applicable to maintenance task to be undertaken?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Fit and use personal protective equipment applicable to maintenance task to be undertaken.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for maintenance

elements.title: Perform scheduled maintenance

pcs.text: Undertake machinery basic servicing tasks in line with workplace practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake machinery basic servicing tasks in line with workplace practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake machinery basic servicing tasks in line with workplace practices.

pcs.text: Adjust equipment according to task requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Adjust equipment according to task requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust equipment according to task requirements.

pcs.text: Apply basic diagnostic techniques and identify and fix mechanical faults
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply basic diagnostic techniques and identify and fix mechanical faults?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply basic diagnostic techniques and identify and fix mechanical faults.

pcs.text: Report serious or complex faults to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report serious or complex faults to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report serious or complex faults to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Perform scheduled maintenance

elements.title: Complete maintenance activities

pcs.text: Clean and store tools according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and store tools according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and store tools according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Clean and maintain work areas and return to operating condition
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and maintain work areas and return to operating condition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and maintain work areas and return to operating condition.

pcs.text: Collect, treat and dispose or recycle waste from maintenance activities according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect, treat and dispose or recycle waste from maintenance activities according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect, treat and dispose or recycle waste from maintenance activities according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Record maintenance procedures in workshop records
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record maintenance procedures in workshop records?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record maintenance procedures in workshop records.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete maintenance activities

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
